item.title: Ano Hi Mita Hana no Namae wo Bokutachi wa Mada Shiranai. Movie (2013)
item.author: Author
item.description: Japanese: 劇場版 あの日見た花の名前を僕達はまだ知らない。 English: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day The Movie Vietnamese title: Released: 2013 My Anime List [[ano-hi-mita-hana-no-namae-w
